title: Pentossaea marginata

The plant is valued for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing, reduce pain, and protect against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Pentoshaea marginata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenes, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Pentoshaea is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
